headline: Time to start looking at value and industrials after strong run up, says Hennessy Funds' Ryan Kelley
summary: Ryan Kelley, Hennessy Funds CIO, joins 'The Exchange' to discuss the year's market drivers, how investors should allocate and much more.

headline: Big Tech's AI ambitions pose a major power test for Europe
summary: Japan's SoftBank on Saturday announced plans to build 3.1 GW of AI data centers in the northern Hauts-de-France region by 2031.
